[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeFramebuffer](../../TextmodeFramebuffer.md) / attachmentCount

# Accessor: attachmentCount

## Get Signature

```ts
get attachmentCount(): number;
```

Number of color attachments available on this framebuffer.

### Returns

`number`

### Example
